hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,os;d=json.load(sys.stdin);f=(d.get('tool_input',{}) or {}).get('file_path','') or '';g=f.replace(chr(92),'/');sys.exit(0) if (not g.endswith('.md') or any(x in g for x in ['/.claude/','/.git/','/memory/']) or os.path.basename(g)=='Verification_Log.md' or 'Diferential pbl for BE' not in g) else print('{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"A project markdown file was just modified. Dispatch the article-verifier subagent in incremental mode on this file to verify any newly-added citations. Per the project research standard, any unverified citations must be removed and logged in Verification_Log.md.\"}}')"
